category_sources: source_facts.description: Java language specific implementation of the Language Server Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jdtls; official Eclipse project name is Eclipse JDT Language Server.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies the official Eclipse JDT LS GitHub project; README and Eclipse project page are official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a Java Language Server Protocol implementation.
